---
title: "Figures for paper GO GSEA"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Figure 4B-C}
# GO Enrichment analysis
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(enrichplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Settings
csv_alll <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/KPMP/DKD/EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_all_20260512_124736.csv"
csv_sig <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/KPMP/DKD/EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_FDR0.05_20260512_124736.csv"

outdir    <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/KPMP/DKD/GO/"
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

SIMPLIFY_CUTOFF <- 0.7
TOP_N           <- 10

# Data loading from csv files
all_results <- read.csv(csv_alll, row.names = 1)
sig_genes   <- read.csv(csv_sig, row.names = 1)

cat("--- Loaded from CSV ---\n")
cat("all_results :", nrow(all_results), "genes\n")
cat("sig_genes   :", nrow(sig_genes),   "genes (FDR < 0.05)\n")
cat("  Up   (logFC > 0):", sum(sig_genes$logFC > 0), "\n")
cat("  Down (logFC < 0):", sum(sig_genes$logFC < 0), "\n\n")

required_cols <- c("logFC", "FDR")
miss_all <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(all_results))
miss_sig <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(sig_genes))
if (length(miss_all) > 0) stop("all_results missing: ", paste(miss_all, collapse = ", "))
if (length(miss_sig) > 0) stop("sig_genes missing: ",   paste(miss_sig, collapse = ", "))

# Creating Universe
all_genes_tested <- rownames(all_results)
cat("--- Universe construction ---\n")
cat("Total tested genes :", length(all_genes_tested), "\n")

universe_df <- bitr(
  all_genes_tested,
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType   = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db
)
valid_universe <- unique(universe_df$ENTREZID)
cat("Mapped to ENTREZID :", length(valid_universe), "\n")
cat("Conversion rate    :",
    round(length(valid_universe) / length(all_genes_tested) * 100, 1), "%\n\n")

# GP BP Upregulated
sig_up <- subset(sig_genes, logFC > 0)
cat("Upregulated DEGs for GO :", nrow(sig_up), "\n")

target_up <- bitr(
  rownames(sig_up),
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType   = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db
)$ENTREZID

go_up <- enrichGO(
  gene          = target_up,
  universe      = valid_universe,
  OrgDb         = org.Hs.eg.db,
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
  qvalueCutoff  = 0.2,
  readable      = TRUE
)

# GO BP Downregulated
sig_down <- subset(sig_genes, logFC < 0)
cat("Downregulated DEGs for GO :", nrow(sig_down), "\n")

target_down <- bitr(
  rownames(sig_down),
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType   = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db
)$ENTREZID

go_down <- enrichGO(
  gene          = target_down,
  universe      = valid_universe,
  OrgDb         = org.Hs.eg.db,
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
  qvalueCutoff  = 0.2,
  readable      = TRUE
)

# Simplify (semantic similarity)
#   - cutoff = 0.7
#   - select_fun = min
cat("--- Simplifying (cutoff =", SIMPLIFY_CUTOFF, ") ---\n")

if (!is.null(go_up) && nrow(go_up@result) > 0) {
  go_up_s <- clusterProfiler::simplify(
    go_up,
    cutoff      = SIMPLIFY_CUTOFF,
    by          = "p.adjust",
    select_fun  = min
  )
  cat("UP   : ", nrow(go_up@result),   "->", nrow(go_up_s@result),
      " (", nrow(go_up@result) - nrow(go_up_s@result),  "merged)\n")
} else {
  go_up_s <- NULL
}

if (!is.null(go_down) && nrow(go_down@result) > 0) {
  go_down_s <- clusterProfiler::simplify(
    go_down,
    cutoff      = SIMPLIFY_CUTOFF,
    by          = "p.adjust",
    select_fun  = min
  )
  cat("DOWN : ", nrow(go_down@result), "->", nrow(go_down_s@result),
      " (", nrow(go_down@result) - nrow(go_down_s@result), "merged)\n\n")
} else {
  go_down_s <- NULL
}

# Result summary
n_up_raw   <- if (!is.null(go_up))   sum(go_up@result$p.adjust   < 0.05) else 0
n_down_raw <- if (!is.null(go_down)) sum(go_down@result$p.adjust < 0.05) else 0
n_up_s     <- if (!is.null(go_up_s))   sum(go_up_s@result$p.adjust   < 0.05) else 0
n_down_s   <- if (!is.null(go_down_s)) sum(go_down_s@result$p.adjust < 0.05) else 0
cat("=== GO BP Enrichment (p.adj < 0.05) ===\n")
cat("Upregulated   : raw =", n_up_raw,   " / simplified =", n_up_s,   "\n")
cat("Downregulated : raw =", n_down_raw, " / simplified =", n_down_s, "\n\n")

# Custom GO dotplot
make_go_dotplot <- function(go_result, top_n = 10,
                            colors,
                            title = "") {
  df <- go_result@result %>%
    dplyr::arrange(p.adjust) %>%               # ascending by p.adjust
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Description = paste0(
        toupper(substr(Description, 1, 1)),
        substring(Description, 2)
      ),
      Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(Description)),
      GeneRatio_num = sapply(GeneRatio, function(x) {
        parts <- as.numeric(strsplit(x, "/")[[1]])
        parts[1] / parts[2]
      })
    )
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = GeneRatio_num, y = Description,
                 color = p.adjust, size = Count)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradientn(
      colors = colors,
      name   = "p.adjust"
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(3, 8), name = "Count") +
    labs(x = "GeneRatio", y = NULL, title = title) +
    guides(                                                   
      color = guide_colorbar(
        reverse    = TRUE,
        barheight  = unit(4, "cm"),
        order      = 1                                      
      ),
      size  = guide_legend(order = 2)                      
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),    
      axis.title.x  = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),    
      axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),  
      axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),  
      legend.title  = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.text   = element_text(size = 11)
    )
}

# Dotplot

# --- Up---
if (!is.null(go_up_s) && nrow(go_up_s@result) > 0) {
  p_up <- make_go_dotplot(
    go_up_s,
    top_n  = TOP_N,
    colors = c("#67000D",   
               "#CB181D",
               "#FB6A4A",
               "#FCBBA1"), 
  )
  
  print(p_up)
  
  ggsave(
    file.path(outdir, paste0("GO_BP_Up_Dotplot_", timestamp, ".png")),
    p_up, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 600
  )
  ggsave(
    file.path(outdir, paste0("GO_BP_Up_Dotplot_", timestamp, ".pdf")),
    p_up, width = 8, height = 7, device = cairo_pdf
  )
  
}

# --- Down ---
if (!is.null(go_down_s) && nrow(go_down_s@result) > 0) {
  p_down <- make_go_dotplot(
    go_down_s,
    top_n  = TOP_N,
    colors = c("#08306B",  
               "#2171B5",
               "#4292C6",
               "#9ECAE1"),  
  )
  
  print(p_down)
  
  ggsave(
    file.path(outdir, paste0("GO_BP_Down_Dotplot_", timestamp, ".png")),
    p_down, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 600
  )
  ggsave(
    file.path(outdir, paste0("GO_BP_Down_Dotplot_", timestamp, ".pdf")),
    p_down, width = 8, height = 7, device = cairo_pdf
  )
  
}

cat("GO enrichment outputs saved to:", outdir, "\n")
```

```{r Figure 2E}
library(dplyr)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(stringr)

csv_all <- read.csv(
  "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/KPMP/DKD/EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_all_20260512_124736.csv"
)

csv_all <- csv_all %>%
  dplyr::rename(gene_name = X)

# GSEA ranking metric 
res_rank <- csv_all %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(gene_name),
    gene_name != "",
    !is.na(logFC),
    !is.na(F)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    rank_metric = sign(logFC) * sqrt(pmax(F, 0))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(gene_name) %>%
  # for duplicate gene symbols, keep the rank with the largest absolute value
  dplyr::slice_max(
    order_by = abs(rank_metric),
    n = 1,
    with_ties = FALSE
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(gene_name, rank_metric)

ranks <- res_rank$rank_metric
names(ranks) <- res_rank$gene_name

# break ties
set.seed(42)
ranks <- ranks + rnorm(length(ranks), sd = 1e-10)

# sort descending for fgsea
ranks <- sort(ranks, decreasing = TRUE)

# load Hallmark gene sets
msig_h <- msigdbr(
  species  = "Homo sapiens",
  category = "H"
) %>%
  dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

# convert to a list for fgsea
pathways <- split(msig_h$gene_symbol, msig_h$gs_name)

# check
length(pathways)
head(names(pathways))

fgseaRes <- fgsea(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks, minSize = 15, maxSize = 500)

table(is.na(csv_all$F))
summary(res_rank$rank_metric)
fgseaRes_sig <- fgseaRes[fgseaRes$padj < 0.05, ]
print(fgseaRes_sig)

# select the most relevant among the significant pathways
# (show the top ~12 by absolute NES)
plot_pathways <- fgseaRes_sig %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>%
  head(12) 


plot_pathways <- plot_pathways %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_label = pathway %>%
      str_remove("^HALLMARK_") %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_to_lower() %>%
      str_to_sentence()
  )

p <- ggplot(plot_pathways, aes(x = reorder(pathway_label, NES), y = NES, fill = NES > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(padj < 0.05, "*", "")), 
            hjust = ifelse(plot_pathways$NES > 0, -0.3, 1.3), 
            vjust = 0.8, size = 8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#e64b35ff", "FALSE" = "#3182bd")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "", y = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.position = "none")

print(p)

  ggsave(
    file.path(outdir, paste0("GSEA_Barplot_", timestamp, ".png")),
    p, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 600
  )
```
